metadata.title: FTL Jub
metadata.author: Hephalumpo, JubJub
metadata.description:
This addon adds some missions and ships relating to JubJub
Adds: - 2 ships - 2 weapons - 2 augments - 1 drone - 4 races - 1 new sector - 2 questlines
Learn about the life of JubJub and work to make a real difference to the world he cares about. Team up with unlikely heros to save the day!
